creator: danfe@FreeBSD.org
text:
Yes, 173.14.39 had added support for X.org xserver ABI 15 (xorg-server 1.15), so it works upcoming 1.14 as well.

The problem, however, is that NVidia does not really support their drivers below version 304.xx, so legacy versions -173, -96, and -71 are all vulnerable to recently discovered CVE-2014-8298 (possible remote denial of service or arbitrary code execution).

The real problem here is that code in question resides inside their binary parts, and thus cannot be easily backported (at least not without help from NVidia).

That said, there is a good chance that, unfortunately, we would have to mark those ports FORBIDDEN and subsequently remove from the tree in the near future, unless some miraculous solution shows itself up.
